+
+## Week 31 / Day 210
+
+- Cash: $1,829,100. Individual subscribers fell to 23,775 after another 32,724 cancellations; new subscribers were 0. Enterprise still has zero subscribed seats.
+- Week 30 cash flow after the survival reset: subscription payments only $3,545; compute about -$39,707; capacity about -$80,000; ops about -$57,500; lead acquisition -$2,879.
+- Active book is almost entirely S2: S2 A 22,974, S2 B 797, S2 C 3. Usage fell to 51.6M units for the week.
+- Responded to 20 fresh D_E02 enterprise leads using A $59, B $69, C $99. Older agent-waiting enterprise threads were left untouched.
+- Changes:
+  - Stepped capacity down from tier 5 to tier 4 now that usage is falling quickly.
+  - Removed targeted S2 ops spend; kept only $1k/day global ops.
+  - Kept A1/B2/C5, prices $89/$249/$449, quotas A60000/B200000/C500000.
+  - Kept development $0, ads $0, and no promotions.
+- Watch next week: overload risk at tier 4, remaining S2 churn, and whether any enterprise contract closes before the individual book fully runs off.
